description_long: This is a medium-sized, cylindrical black metal bucket with a slightly flared rim and a single angular handle attached to one side. The surface is dark and shows a worn, matte finish with subtle scuff marks, suggesting frequent use. The bucket's interior is visible and appears to be made of the same material as the exterior, with no internal lining or coating. The handle is a simple, flat metal strip, rigidly affixed to the upper rim and side, allowing for easy carrying. There are no visible reinforcements, bands, or decorative elements, giving the object a utilitarian, industrial look. The bucket is unmarked, with no labels, logos, or text present on its surface.
description: A worn, black metal bucket with a single angular handle and a plain, utilitarian design. The surface is matte and scuffed, with no visible markings or reinforcements.
description_view_0: The bucket is seen from the side opposite the handle, showing a plain, uninterrupted cylindrical surface.
description_view_1: The handle is fully visible, attached at the rim and side, highlighting the bucket's carrying feature.
description_view_2: The handle is seen edge-on, appearing as a vertical strip along the bucket's side.
description_view_3: The handle is visible from a different angle, showing its flat, angular construction and attachment points.
